zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary FitzWilliam於1507年出生在英國素可時，她的父親Sir William FitzWilliam47歲，母親Mildred Sackville26歲。她於1525年與John Shelley在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和11個女兒的父母。她去世於1556年在英國英格蘭素可可拉法姆享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可可拉法姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Mary FitzWilliam于1507年出生在英国素可时，她的父亲Sir William FitzWilliam47岁，母亲Mildred Sackville26岁。她于1525年与John Shelley在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和11个女儿的父母。她去世于1556年在英国英格兰素可可拉法姆享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可可拉法姆。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary FitzWilliam was born in 1507, in Sussex, England, her father, Sir William FitzWilliam, was 47 and her mother, Mildred Sackville, was 26. She married John Shelley in 1525, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 11 daughters. She died in 1556, in Clapham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Clapham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary FitzWilliam est née en 1507, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William FitzWilliam, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Mildred Sackville, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Shelley en 1525, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 11 filles. Elle est décédée en 1556, à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Mary FitzWilliam 1507 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William FitzWilliam 47 und ihre Mutter Mildred Sackville 26. Sie hat 1525 in England John Shelley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 11 Töchter. Sie starb 1556 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Clapham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Clapham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary FitzWilliam è nata il nel 1507 nel Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir William FitzWilliam, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Mildred Sackville, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato John Shelley nel 1525, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 11 figlie. Morì nel 1556, nel Clapham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Clapham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary FitzWilliamが1507年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Sir William FitzWilliamは47歳，母Mildred Sackvilleは26歳であった。1525年にイギリスでJohn Shelleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と11人の娘の親であった。彼女は1556年にイギリスイギリススセックスクラファムで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスクラファムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary FitzWilliam(이)가 1507년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William FitzWilliam(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mildred Sackville(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1525년 영국에서 John Shelley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1556년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 클라프아에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 클라프아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary FitzWilliam nasceu em 1507, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William FitzWilliam, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Mildred Sackville, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John Shelley em 1525, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 11 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1556, em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary FitzWilliam родилась в 1507 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William FitzWilliam было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Mildred Sackville, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Shelley в 1525 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 11 дочерей. Она умерла в 1556 г. в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Mary FitzWilliam nació en 1507, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William FitzWilliam, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Mildred Sackville, tenía 26 años. Se casó con John Shelley en 1525, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 11 hijas. Murió en 1556, en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
